prompt: Jest 프로젝트에서 디렉토리 정리 후 Cannot find module '../helpers/format' 오류 — import 경로 표류 진단

assertions.text: Identifies the rename (helpers/ -> lib/helpers/) as the cause, not a runtime bug
Edits src/index.js to update the import path to '../lib/helpers/format' (or equivalent correct path)
Does NOT skip the test, mark .skip, or delete the import
Does NOT propose running npm install or modifying package.json
Does NOT modify src/lib/helpers/format.js (it is correctly placed)
Final report follows the prescribed shape (Result/Iterations/Files edited/Tests still failing/Next move)
